codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior loading-name regression correctly. `Button.vue` now inspects fallthrough attrs before applying the loading fallback label, so text buttons keep their visible accessible name, icon buttons keep caller-provided `aria-label`, and unlabeled loading buttons still receive the default `aria-label="加载中"` plus hidden loading text.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, `ui-worker` skill, and commit `6cee14e`. The implementation covers all three required accessible-name scenarios without breaking attribute fallthrough, and the updated Button tests exercise the regression path that previously failed scrutiny.
